title: Add synchronized_hop_channel helper matching CCP-12 hash_32 and test vectors
description: Implement synchronized_hop_channel(eui64: bytes, sfn: int, num_channels: int=8) -> int using hash_32(FNV-1a32) from generate.py or shared util. Align with ccp16-hop.json vectors and spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md. Add to medium.py or sim utils. Reference test vectors.
